jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Vedantu
jsonLd.description:
Vedantu, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
